coarse_alignment_reason: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.
chinese_text:
十畝之間兮，桑者閑閑兮。行與子還兮。
十畝之外兮，桑者泄泄兮。行與子逝兮。
translation_text:
1 Among their ten acres
The mulberry-planters stand idly about.
‘Come，’ [says one to another]， ‘I will return with you.’

2 Beyond those ten acres，
The mulberry-planters move idly about.

4 Come/ [says one to another], 4I will go away with you.1
